name: @coodra/cli
description: Coodra CLI — single-binary install/configure/run/diagnose surface for solo and team modes. Module 08a.

scripts.//build: Two-phase build (decision dec_83ba10c1, 2026-05-02). tsc emits .d.ts + the loose `dist/lib/outbox/*.js` files that workspace consumers (apps in dev) import via the `@coodra/cli/lib/outbox` exports entry. Then `scripts/bundle.mjs` runs esbuild to OVERWRITE `dist/index.js` with a self-contained bundle (workspace + npm deps inlined) and writes the bundled apps under `dist/runtime/{mcp-server,hooks-bridge}/` so `npm i -g @coodra/cli` ships everything needed. Externals: better-sqlite3 + sqlite-vec (native).
scripts.//install:global: Symlink the workspace build into the user's global npm prefix so `coodra` on $PATH points at the local dist/. --force overwrites any stale install (e.g. the pre-rename `@coodra/cli` package). Run after `pnpm --filter @coodra/cli build`.
scripts.//prepublishOnly: Asserts the bundled web + service runtimes are present before npm publishes a tarball. bundle.mjs soft-skips the web copy when apps/web-v2/.next/standalone is missing (so CI typecheck stays fast); this hook is the load-bearing safety net for the publish path.

//dependencies: Only true npm-resolvable runtime deps live here (decision dec_83ba10c1). Native modules are kept external from the bundle so they install correctly per platform; everything else is inlined. Workspace deps + bundleable npm deps moved to devDependencies so `pnpm publish` / `npm install` of the published tarball does not try to resolve `workspace:*` placeholders.
//devDependencies: Phase 3 Fix E (2026-05-02): @coodra/{mcp-server,hooks-bridge} were previously declared here so the bundle.mjs script's esbuild could resolve their imports via cli's node_modules. They were removed because pnpm + turbo treats devDependencies as ^build edges, and apps/{mcp-server,hooks-bridge} also declare @coodra/cli (for /lib/outbox), which produced a build-time cycle that turbo refused to schedule. esbuild reads apps/{mcp-server,hooks-bridge}/src/index.ts via absolute filesystem paths and resolves their transitive imports through the workspace-root node_modules — no cli-local dep declaration is needed.
//ui-deps: react + ink + ink-* power the interactive TUI (`coodra` no-args / `coodra ui`) and live in devDependencies, not dependencies: they are pure-JS and esbuild inlines them into dist/index.js at bundle time (same treatment as commander/execa/zod). Only the two native modules stay in `dependencies`. @types/react is dev-only typings.
